params.name: Pan's Flute
params.description: Pan was once obsessed with Syrinx, goddess of Mountains and Forests, but she would rather turn into a reed than accept him. Pan made the reed into a musical instrument bearing the name of his beloved Syrinx. And then Pan abandoned this flute that accompanied him for most of his life.
